kirundi.no_sandals_or_open_toed_shoes_in_the_c: Nta nkweto zugurutse canke zerekana intoki z'ibirenge muri laboratwari y'imiti
kirundi.know_where_it_is_before_you_start_you_: Menya aho hari mbere yo gutangura: ufite amasegonda 10 nihagira icaguteranira
kirundi.acetic_acid_is_flammable_know_your_nea: Aside acetic irahita: menya igikoresho co kuzimya umuriro kiri hafi yawe
kirundi.safety_data_sheets_list_all_hazards_pp: Impapuro z'amakuru y'umutekano zishira ku rutonde akaga kose, ibikoresho vy'ubwirinzi, n'inzira z'ibihutirwa
kirundi.always_add_titrant_slowly_near_the_exp: Buri gihe ongeraho titrant buhoro hafi y'ingingo y'iherezo witezwe. Igitonyanga kimwe gishobora guhindura pH cane!
kirundi.you_overshot_the_equivalence_point_in_: Warengeje ingingo y'uburinganire! Muri laboratwari nyayo, ugomba gutangura bundi bushasha n'icitegererezo gishasha.
kirundi.good_lab_practice_always_rinse_the_bur: Imikorere myiza ya laboratwari: banza woze biuret n'amazi yagejejwe, hanyuma n'umuti wa titrant mbere yo kuyuzuza bundi bushasha.
kirundi.at_the_half_equivalence_point_ph_pka_t: Ku ngingo y'igice c'uburinganire pH = pKa. Iyi ni yo hagati y'akarere ka buffer!
kirundi.kmno_is_a_strong_oxidizer_in_a_real_la: KMnO₄ ni oxidizer ikomeye! Muri laboratwari nyayo, uyishire kure y'imiti ishonga ya organic kandi ukoreshe fume hood. Umuhengeri → nta rangi = ingingo y'iherezo.
kirundi.polyprotic_acids_have_multiple_equival: Aside za polyprotic zifite ingingo nyinshi z'uburinganire! Raba uko umurongo w'S ugenda uresha hagati ya buri ngingo (uturere twa buffer).
kirundi.in_a_back_titration_you_add_excess_aci: Muri titration yo inyuma, ubanza kongeraho aside irenze, hanyuma ugakora titration y'aside isigaye. Ikorera ku vyitegererezo bidashonga nka CaCO₃.
kirundi.never_add_water_to_concentrated_acid_a: Ntukongereho amazi kuri aside ikomeye na rimwe! Buri gihe ongeraho aside mu mazi. «Kora neza: aside mu mazi.» Ihinduka risohora ubushuhe rishobora gutera guteranywa bibi.
kirundi.when_using_volatile_reagents_like_nh_o: Iyo ukoresha reagents zihindagurika nka NH₃ canke HCl (ikomeye), buri gihe kora munsi ya fume hood. Guhumeka umwuka wa aside/base bangiza ingirabuzimafatizo z'ibihaha.
kirundi.remove_clothing_rinse_under_running_wa: Kuramwo imyenda, uze munsi y'amazi atemba iminota 15+
kirundi.correct_immediate_and_prolonged_rinsin: Vyukuri! Koga ako kanya no mu gihe kirekire ni ingenzi cane. Iminota 15 irinda kwangirika kw'ingirabuzimafatizo.
kirundi.not_recommended_the_neutralization_rea: Ntibisabwa! Ihinduka ryo kunga rikora ubushuhe (risohora ubushuhe) rishobora kwiyongera ku gutwikwa. Amazi buri gihe ni igisubizo ca mbere.
kirundi.dangerous_even_dilute_acids_can_cause_: Akaga! Ndetse na aside zacogoye zishobora gutera gutwikwa mu gihe. Buri gihe cakira ihura ry'imiti ako kanya.
kirundi.go_to_eyewash_station_immediately_rins: Ja aho koga amaso ako kanya, uze iminota 15+, ugume wugurutse ibihenehene
kirundi.correct_speed_is_everything_you_have_a: Vyukuri! Umuvuduko ni vyose: ufite hafi amasegonda 10 mbere y'uko kwangirika gukomeye gutangura. Gumana ibihenehene vyugurutse kandi uhindukize umutwe wawe kugira ngo urinde ihumana gukwirakwira mu jisho rindi.
kirundi.use_eye_drops_from_the_first_aid_kit: Koresha ibitonyanga vy'amaso biva mu gakoresho k'ubutabazi bwa mbere
kirundi.eye_drops_are_insufficient_you_need_hi: Ibitonyanga vy'amaso ntibihagije! Ukeneye koga vyinshi mu minota 15+. Ibitonyanga vy'amaso ntibishobora gutanga ivyo.
kirundi.extremely_dangerous_naoh_causes_alkali: Akaga cane! NaOH itera gutwikwa kwa alkali kwinjira mu maso mu gihe. Buri segonda ni ingenzi. Guteranywa kw'ijisho n'imiti ni impamvu ya #1 y'ubuhumyi muri laboratwari.
kirundi.perfect_procedure_1_alert_nearby_stude: Uburyo bwuzuye! (1) Menyesha abanyeshure bari hafi (2) Tanga imipaka ku gukwirakwira ukoresheje pad y'ikinyunyuza (3) Sanga sodium bicarbonate kugira ngo unge (4) Sukura n'amazi (5) Jugunya neza.
kirundi.partially_right_but_incomplete_floodin: Vyukuri igice ariko ntibishitse. Kuyuzuza gukwirakwiza aside kurushaho kandi ntibiyunga. Banza utange imipaka, hanyuma unge, hanyuma woge.
kirundi.telling_the_teacher_is_good_but_at_0_1: Kubwira umwigisha ni vyiza ariko kuri 0.1M ibi birashobora gucungwa. Ugomba gutangura gucunga ako kanya mu gihe umuntu abwira umwigisha. Ntukemere ko igera ku mpera y'ameza.
kirundi.paper_towels_are_not_appropriate_for_a: Taulo z'impapuro ntizikwiye ku kumeneka kwa aside! Ntiziyunga aside kandi uzafata ibikoresho vyatoshwe na aside. Koresha agakoresho k'imeneka kakwiye.
kirundi.while_working_with_ammonia_nh_you_noti: Mu gukora na ammonia (NH₃), ubona impumuro ikaze kandi amaso yawe atangura kwiraguza amarira.
kirundi.move_the_experiment_to_the_fume_hood_i: Jana igerageza kuri fume hood ako kanya, injizamo umwuka mu karere
kirundi.correct_volatile_chemicals_like_nh_mus: Vyukuri! Imiti ihindagurika nka NH₃ igomba gucungwa munsi ya fume hood. Nimba ushobora kuyumva impumuro, uyihumeka. Ugurura amadirisha kandi usohoke uje mu mwuka mwiza nimba hood iri kure.
kirundi.a_regular_face_mask_does_not_protect_a: Agapfukamunwa gasanzwe ntikarinda umwuka w'imiti! Ukeneye kurinda guhumeka bikwiye (ntibiboneka muri laboratwari nyinshi z'amashure) canke fume hood.
kirundi.dangerous_if_you_can_smell_nh_the_conc: Akaga! Nimba ushobora kuyumva impumuro ya NH₃, ubwinshi bushobora kurenga urwego rw'umutekano (25 ppm). Ihura ry'igihe kirekire ritera gutwikwa kw'imiti mu nzira y'ubuhumekero. NH₃ irenze 300 ppm ishobora kwica.
kirundi.a_classmate_suggests_cleaning_the_benc: Igihe ukiri wugurutse umuti wa ammonia, mugenzi wawe w'ishure asaba gusukura ameza na bleach.
kirundi.life_saving_action_naocl_2nh_2nh_cl_ch: Igikorwa co gukiza ubuzima! NaOCl + 2NH₃ → 2NH₂Cl (chloramine) — gaze y'uburozi itera kwangirika gukomeye kw'ubuhumekero. Iyi ni imwe mu mavange ataziguye ateje akaga cane muri laboratwari. Buri gihe unge kandi ujugunye imiti yose mbere yo gukoresha umuti wo gusukura uwo ariwo wose.
kirundi.extremely_dangerous_mixing_bleach_naoc: Akaga cane! Kuvanga bleach (NaOCl) na ammonia bikora gaze ya chloramine y'uburozi. Vyateje urupfu muri laboratwari no mu mazu. Ntuvange bleach n'undi muti uwo ariwo wose na rimwe.
kirundi.it_should_be_fine_if_the_ammonia_is_di: Igomba kuba nziza nimba ammonia yacogoye
kirundi.wrong_even_dilute_ammonia_reacts_with_: Ikosa! Ndetse na ammonia yacogoye ihindukana na bleach ikora gaze ya chloramine y'uburozi. Ihinduka riba ku bwinshi ubwo aribwo bwose. Nta kugabanya bifite umutekano vyo kuvanga iyi miti.
kirundi.just_open_a_window_and_it_will_be_fine: Gusa ugurura idirisha kandi bizaba vyiza
kirundi.ventilation_does_not_make_it_safe_to_g: Injira y'umwuka ntibituma biba vyiza gukora gaze y'uburozi! Chloramine itera ingorane zo guhumeka ako kanya. Kwirinda ni bwo buryo bwonyine bwemewe.
kirundi.all_three_are_mandatory_goggles_protec: Vyose uko ari bitatu ni ngombwa: amadarubindi arinda amaso guteranywa, uduhu tw'amaboko turinda amaboko ibishenya, kandi ikoti ririnda imyenda n'uruhu.
kirundi.water_first_always_the_15_minute_rinse: Amazi mbere buri gihe! Koga iminota 15 ni ingenzi. Ivyunga bishobora gutera ihinduka risohora ubushuhe ku ruhu.
kirundi.the_exothermic_reaction_can_cause_viol: Ihinduka risohora ubushuhe rishobora gutera gutogota gukaze no guteranywa
kirundi.when_water_hits_concentrated_acid_the_: Iyo amazi akubise aside ikomeye, ubushuhe busohotse bushobora gutogosa amazi ako kanya, bigatera guteranywa gukaze kwa aside ishushe. Kongeraho aside mu mazi bikwirakwiza ubushuhe mu bwinshi bunini bw'amazi.
kirundi.strong_acid_strong_base_or_weak_acid_s: Aside ikomeye + base ikomeye canke aside idafite imbaraga + base ikomeye
kirundi.bleach_ammonia_chloramine_gas_toxic_bl: Bleach + ammonia = gaze ya chloramine (uburozi). Bleach + aside = gaze ya chlorine (uburozi). Vyombi bishobora gutera gukomereka gukomeye kw'ubuhumekero canke urupfu. Ntuvange bleach n'imiti na rimwe.
kirundi.at_half_equivalence_ha_a_so_henderson_: Ku gice c'uburinganire [HA] = [A⁻] bityo Henderson–Hasselbalch itanga pH = pKa + log(1) = pKa. Iyi ni yo hagati y'akarere ka buffer.
kirundi.when_handling_1m_concentrated_acids_or: Iyo ucunga aside canke base ikomeye >1M
kirundi.face_shields_provide_splash_protection: Ingabo z'uraramutwe zitanga ubwirinzi bwo guteranywa ku maso yose. Zikenewe ku bishenya bikomeye (>1M), gushusha, n'uburyo ubwo aribwo bwose bufite ingaruka zo guteranywa hejuru y'akarere k'amaso.
kirundi.concentrated_hcl_dissolves_skin_on_con: HCl ikomeye ishonga uruhu igihe iyihuye. Ndetse na aside zacogoye zitera uburakari. Amaboko yawe ari hafi cane y'imiti.
kirundi.a_splash_of_acid_or_base_will_burn_thr: Guteranywa kwa aside canke base bizatwika binyuze mu myenda no mu ruhu. Ikoti ritanga urwego rw'inzitizi rushobora gukurwaho.
kirundi.a_dropped_beaker_sends_glass_and_chemi: Beaker yaguye yohereza ikirahure n'imiti hasi hose. Inkweto zugurutse intoki z'ibirenge bisigura aside ku birenge vyambaye ubusa.
kirundi.equip_each_piece_of_ppe_before_proceed: Ambara buri gice c'ibikoresho vy'ubwirinzi mbere yo kubandanya. Muri laboratwari nyayo, ntushobora gukoraho imiti udafite ubwirinzi bwuzuye.
kirundi.find_each_piece_of_safety_equipment_on: Rondera buri gice c'ibikoresho vy'umutekano ku ikarita ya laboratwari. Mu bihutirwa nyavyo, amasegonda ni ingenzi — ugomba kumenya aho vyose biri mbere yo gutangura.
kirundi.the_10_second_rule_if_chemicals_splash: Itegeko ry'amasegonda 10: nimba imiti iteranira mu maso yawe, ufite hafi amasegonda 10 yo kugera aho koga amaso mbere y'uko kwangirika burundu gutangura. Gumana ibihenehene vyugurutse kandi woge iminota 15+.
kirundi.remember_p_a_s_s_pull_the_pin_aim_at_b: Ibuka P.A.S.S.: Pull (Kurura pini), Aim (Erekeza ku shingiro ry'umuriro), Squeeze (Fyonda igikoresho), Sweep (Kubura uruhande rumwe uja ku rundi). Aside acetic n'imwe mu miti ishonga birahita — menya iyi ahantu mbere yo gutangura.
kirundi.sds_documents_list_all_hazards_require: Inyandiko za SDS zishira ku rutonde akaga kose, ibikoresho vy'ubwirinzi bikenewe, intambwe z'ubutabazi bwa mbere, n'aho guhamagara mu bihutirwa ku muti wose muri laboratwari. Bisuzume mbere yo gucunga umuti uwo ariwo wose.
kirundi.you_can_now_locate_all_emergency_equip: Ubu ushobora kurondera ibikoresho vyose vy'ibihutirwa uhereye ku meza yawe. Mu bihutirwa, buri segonda ni ingenzi — ubu bumenyi bushobora gukiza ubuzima.
kirundi.review_every_chemical_you_will_handle_: Suzuma buri muti uzacunga uyu munsi. Fyonda buri karita kugira ngo wemere ko wumva akaga.
kirundi.tap_to_acknowledge_you_ve_reviewed_thi: ☝ Fyonda kugira ngo wemere ko wasuzumye uyu muti
kirundi.ppe_active_lab_safety_verified: Ibikoresho vy'ubwirinzi birakora • Umutekano wa laboratwari wemejwe
kirundi.eyewash_10_second_rule_fire_extinguish: 🚿 Koga amaso: itegeko ry'amasegonda 10 • 🧯 Kuzimya umuriro caboneka • 📋 SDS yasuzumwe
kirundi.match_real_world_unknowns_by_titrating: Huza ibitazwi vy'isi nyayo ukora titration kugeza ±0.05 ml y'agaciro ka teoriya. Kurikirana ubunyabwenge + umuvuduko; guha amanota bihuye na AP Chem.
kirundi.safety_drills_what_could_go_wrong: Imyitozo y'umutekano — Ni iki cagenda nabi
kirundi.burette_explodes_acid_burns_spill_indi: Biuret iraturika, kumeneka kwo gutwikwa kwa aside, ikigaragaza congewemo vuba cane. Witoze urukurikirane rw'igisubizo ciza mbere y'uko biba ingenzi muri laboratwari nyayo.
kirundi.burette_tolerance_0_05_ml_volumetric_f: Ihanganwa rya biuret 0.05 ml; flask y'ubwinshi 0.10 ml; pipette 0.02 ml. Iciciro c'ubunyabwenge A ugereranyije na B kikuba kabiri ikosa. Guhuza ni ingenzi kurusha uko abanyeshure biyumvira.
kirundi.stock_diluent_desired_concentration_th: Stock + ikigabanya → ubwinshi bushakwa. Ibibazo 4 vya AP Chem bipimwa cane bigabanuka kuri iri hwanyakubara rimwe. Kurikirana imibare y'ingenzi: ipimo rifite imbaraga nke rigena igisubizo.
kirundi.adjust_acid_strength_a_ha_ratio_starti: Hindura imbaraga za aside, igipimo ca [A⁻]/[HA], na pH y'itanguriro. Ibisubizo bitandukanye: buffer nziza canke buffer mbi (nyuma yo kongeraho aside yiyongera 20%). Nta manota, nta guhishura — kurondera no kwitegereza gusa.
kirundi.the_trace_shows_relative_reaction_prog: Umurongo werekana iterambere ry'ihinduka rigereranije, atari pH — nta mita ya pH hano. Ingingo y'iherezo ni ibara rya pinki ryoroheje rya mbere rimara riva ku kurenga guke kwa MnO₄⁻ (rikora ihinduka umuhengeri → nta rangi kugeza ico gihe). Soma iyi ngingo y'iherezo mu ibara.
kirundi.where_the_indicator_changes_color_idea: — aho ikigaragaza gihindura ibara. Batoranya neza kugira ngo ingingo y'iherezo ≈ ingingo y'uburinganire.
kirundi.the_flat_part_of_a_weak_acid_base_curv: — igice kiresha c'umurongo wa aside/base idafite imbaraga aho pH irwanya impinduka (Henderson–Hasselbalch ikora).
kirundi.weak_acids_bases_that_change_color_at_: — aside/base zidafite imbaraga zihindura ibara ku turere twihariye twa pH. Toranya iyo urwego rw'impinduka rwayo rukubiyemo pH y'uburinganire.
kirundi.never_mix_bleach_with_ammonia_toxic_ch: — Ntuvange bleach na ammonia na rimwe (gaze ya chloramine y'uburozi). Ntukongereho amazi kuri aside ikomeye na rimwe (akaga ko guteranywa gusohora ubushuhe — buri gihe ongeraho aside mu mazi).
kirundi.neutralized_acid_base_solutions_ph_6_8: — Imiti ya aside/base yunzwe (pH 6–8) ishobora gusukwa mu muyoboro w'amazi n'amazi menshi. Ku miti ikomeye suzuma politiki y'imyanda y'imiti y'ikigo cawe.
kirundi.using_simple_everyday_words_and_short_: Ukoresheje amagambo yoroshe ya buri munsi n'interuro ngufi
kirundi.for_a_5th_grade_student_brief_and_frie: Ku munyeshure w'umwaka wa 5, muri make kandi mu bucuti
kirundi.for_a_high_school_chemistry_student_ac: Ku munyeshure wa shimi w'amashure yisumbuye, nyabwo ariko vyumvikana
kirundi.click_explain_to_have_the_ai_tutor_des: Fyonda «Sigura» kugira ngo umwigisha wa AI asigure iyi titration ku rwego rwo gusoma wahisemo.
kirundi.lab_safety_chemistry_challenge: 🏆 Ikibazo c'umutekano wa laboratwari na shimi
kirundi.lab_safety_incident_simulator: 🚨 Igikoresho cigana igikorwa c'umutekano wa laboratwari
kirundi.practice_responding_to_real_lab_emerge: Witoze gusubiza ibihutirwa nyavyo vya laboratwari. Toranya igisubizo ciza ku buri muterere. Iyi myitozo ishobora gukiza ubuzima bwawe muri laboratwari nyayo!
kirundi.master_the_correct_technique_for_each_: Menya neza uburyo bukwiye ku gikoresho cose. Uburyo bwiza = ibisubizo binyabwenge + akazi ka laboratwari gafite umutekano.
kirundi.always_add_acid_to_water_never_water_t: Buri gihe ongeraho aside mu mazi, ntukongereho amazi kuri aside na rimwe. Kuvanga bisohora ubushuhe kandi bishobora gutera gutogota gukaze no guteranywa kwa aside ikomeye.
kirundi.stopper_and_invert_10_times_to_mix_tho: Ugara kandi uhindure inshuro 10 kugira ngo uvange neza
kirundi.titration_curve_finding_the_equivalenc: Umurongo wa titration — Kurondera ingingo y'uburinganire
kirundi.three_sliders_weak_acid_strength_ka_bu: Ba-slider batatu: imbaraga za aside idafite imbaraga (Ka), igipimo ca buffer [A⁻]/[HA], na pH y'itanguriro. Kwigana kubwira nimba buffer imara canke inanirwa nyuma yo kongeraho aside yiyongera 20% (ibisubizo bitandukanye — nta «amanota ya buffer» y'umubare). Nyeganyega ba-slider. Andika ivyo witegereje. Andika ivyo wavumbuye ku vyatuma buffer iba nziza.
kirundi.your_hypothesis_free_text_no_right_ans: Iciyumviro cawe (inyandiko yigenga — nta gisubizo ciza):
kirundi.what_single_condition_makes_the_differ: Ni ikihe kimwe cihariye gitandukanya nziza na mbi? Igipimo ni ingenzi kurusha pKa? pH y'itanguriro ni ingenzi na gato? Andika teoriya yawe bwite.
kirundi.i_m_stuck_show_me_questions_to_think_a: 🤔 Nafashwe — nyereka ibibazo vyo kwiyumvira (nta bisubizo)
kirundi.fix_ratio_at_1_0_sweep_pka_from_2_to_1: Fatanya igipimo kuri 1.0. Nyura pKa kuva 2 kugeza 12. Ese agaciro kamwe ka pKa ni buffer nziza kurushaho mu buryo busanzwe? Kuki vyaba bimeze bityo?
kirundi.set_pka_4_74_acetic_acid_sweep_ratio_f: Shiraho pKa = 4.74 (aside acetic). Nyura igipimo kuva 0.05 kugeza 20. Ni ku bihe bipimo buffer imara? Hari «agasanduku keza» gahwanye mu gipimo?
kirundi.find_one_good_buffer_then_change_one_s: Rondera buffer nziza imwe. Hanyuma hindura slider imwe kugeza iba mbi. Ni impinduka imwe ihe ifite akamaro kurusha izindi?
kirundi.log_4_5_good_buffers_with_different_pk: Andika ba-buffer 4-5 beza bafite agaciro gatandukanye ka pKa. pH zabo z'itanguriro zisangiye iki na pKa zabo?
kirundi.in_real_biochemistry_blood_is_buffered: Muri biochimie nyayo, amaraso yubakwa buffer kuri pH 7.4 — ni akahe ka pKa kaba gakwiye cane kuri iyo sisitemu ya buffer? Rondera urondera ba-buffer phosphate na bicarbonate.
kirundi.i_think_i_understand_the_trade_offs_le: Ndiyumvira ko numva impinduranya — reka mbisigure mu magambo yanje bwite
kirundi.explain_in_your_own_words_what_is_the_: Sigura mu magambo yawe bwite: isano riri hagati ya pKa, igipimo, na pH y'itanguriro ni irihe? Ni ikihe kimwe cihariye (canke ivanga) gituma buffer imara kuri aside nyinshi? Kuki urwego rw'igipimo ari ingenzi?
kirundi.saved_notice_nobody_checked_your_answe: ✓ Vyabitswe. Icitonderwa — nta muntu wasuzumye igisubizo cawe. Iyi ni kamere y'ubushakashatsi buyoborwa n'umunyeshure.
kirundi.design_note_no_buffer_capacity_score_n: Icitonderwa c'igishushanyo: nta manota y'ubushobozi bwa buffer, nta buto yo guhishura, nta isuzuma rya quiz. Ibisubizo vyerekanwa nk'imiterere 2 itandukanye (nziza / mbi) aho kuba urwego rubandanya — ku bushake, kugira ngo bigabanye imyitwarire yo kunoza. Icy'ingenzi ni ubushakashatsi, si umubare.
